text.div:
Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Risk Adjustment Condition Category Type Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 3 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  historicHistoric Condition Category GapHistoric Condition Category (CC) Gap. Historic Condition Category (CC) is based on verified data from any clinical evaluation period.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  suspectedSuspected Condition Category GapSuspected Condition Category (CC) Gap. A member has never had this as a verified Condition Category (CC), but when a Server runs a suspecting algorithm, suspected Condition Categories (CCs) are identified.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  net-newNet-New Condition CategoryNet-New Condition Category (CC). New Condition Category (CC), not from suspected process or historic. A Net-New Condition Category (CC) is documented for the first time during the clinical evaluation period for the risk adjustment model. Any Condition Categories (CCs) that are net new must be either closed-gap or pending and cannot be open-gap.

Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Risk Adjustment Condition Category Type Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 3 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  historicHistoric Condition Category GapHistoric Condition Category (CC) Gap. Historic Condition Category (CC) is based on verified data from any clinical evaluation period.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  suspectedSuspected Condition Category GapSuspected Condition Category (CC) Gap. A member has never had this as a verified Condition Category (CC), but when a Server runs a suspecting algorithm, suspected Condition Categories (CCs) are identified.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/cc-type  net-newNet-New Condition CategoryNet-New Condition Category (CC). New Condition Category (CC), not from suspected process or historic. A Net-New Condition Category (CC) is documented for the first time during the clinical evaluation period for the risk adjustment model. Any Condition Categories (CCs) that are net new must be either closed-gap or pending and cannot be open-gap.

Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Coding Gap Remark Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 7 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  assessed-presentAssessed and presentAssessed the gap and acknowledged it is still present.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  assessed-not-presentAssessed and not presentAssessed the gap and acknowledged it is not present.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  in-progressIn progressAssessed the gap and actions are taken to address the gap.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  deferredDeferredAssessed the gap and actions will be taken in the future to address the gap.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  not-assessedNot assessedGap was shown to the provider but no action was taken to assess the gap.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  not-presentedNot presentedSystem did not present the gap to the end user.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/coding-gap-remark  not-ingestedNot ingestedSystem cannot process the gap that was received.

Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Risk Adjustment Evidence Status Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 4 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/evidence-status  closed-gapClosed Condition Category GapEvidence to support a Condition Category (CC) was confirmed
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/evidence-status  invalid-gapInvalid Condition Category GapEvidence to support a Condition Category (CC) was invalidated.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/evidence-status  open-gapOpen Condition Category GapAction is needed to confirm whether the Condition Category (CC) is valid.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/evidence-status  pendingPending Condition Category GapEvidence was received by the payer and is in the process of being evaluated.

Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Risk Adjustment Hierarchical Status Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 4 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/hierarchical-status  applied-supersededHierarchies applied and Condition Category is supersededHierarchies were applied to a Condition Category (CC) and the Condition Category (CC) is superseded.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/hierarchical-status  applied-not-supersededHierarchies applied and Condition Category is not supersededHierarchies were applied to a Condition Category (CC) and the Condition Category (CC) is not superseded.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/hierarchical-status  not-appliedHierarchies not appliedHierarchies were not applied to a Condition Category (CC).
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/hierarchical-status  not-applicableNot applicableApplying hierarchies to a Condition Category (CC) is not applicable.

contains.display: Hierarchies applied and Condition Category is superseded
Hierarchies applied and Condition Category is not superseded

text.div:
Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Remark Reason Codes v3.0.0-ballot (CodeSystem)

This value set contains 3 concepts

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/remark-reason  never-had-conditionPatient never had the conditionReason for the assessed-not-present remark is because the patient has never had this condition.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/remark-reason  inactive-conditionCondition no longer activeReason for the assessed-not-present remark is because the patient's condition is no longer active.
http://hl7.org/fhir/us/davinci-ra/CodeSystem/remark-reason  inapplicable-gapInapplicable gapReason for the assessed-not-present remark is because the patient has an active condition but the gap does not accurately describe it.
